states.description: Category view (Images/Videos/Audio/Documents/Recent) accessed from nav drawer
Generic folder content view inside internal storage

visual_cues: recent search history (with X to delete)

states.description: Search results with possible filter applied
Selection mode after long-press on a file

visual_cues: dropdown with: New window/New folder/Sort by/Select all/Get info/Show hidden files/Open with/Copy to/Move to/Rename
options: File name, Modified (newest first), Type, Size

states.description: Dialog for creating a new folder

visual_cues: filename text field with name highlighted (extension preserved)

states.description: Destination picker after Move to/Copy to
Get info screen for a file
Android share sheet for selected file
Markor text editor view of file
visual_cues: top toolbar (save floppy, search magnifier, eye preview, undo)
pencil icon top-right to return to editor

states.description: Markor date/time Format dialog (from clock icon)
visual_cues: format presets (yyyy-MM-dd, Date only, Time only)

states.description: Chrome browser viewing the loaded HTML file

visual_cues: text input at top with N/N counter

states.description: Digital Wellbeing 'App paused' dialog blocking Files

strategies.name: OPEN_FILES_APP
steps: swipe up to open app drawer
land on Downloads view by default
strategies.fallback: If 'App paused' dialog appears (Digital Wellbeing), dismiss and use Gallery as fallback for media

strategies.name: NAVIGATE_TO_INTERNAL_STORAGE_ROOT
strategies.success_signal: breadcrumb shows device storage name; standard root folders (Alarms, Android, DCIM...) visible
strategies.fallback: If wrong folder opened, press Back and re-tap correct one

strategies.name: NAVIGATE_TO_CATEGORY
strategies.fallback: Tapping category chip in Downloads only filters that folder; use nav drawer instead

strategies.name: APPLY_FILTERS_AND_COUNT
strategies.preconditions: in a category or folder view
steps: tap each required filter chip (e.g., Large files, This week, Documents, Audio, Images, Videos)
read results: count items or observe 'No matches' = 0
strategies.success_signal: active chips checked; result list or empty state shown
strategies.fallback: If multiple chips give ambiguous count, toggle one at a time

strategies.name: SEARCH_FILE
steps: optionally tap filter chip to narrow (Documents/Images/Audio/Videos)
strategies.success_signal: matching file appears or 'No matches in <scope>'
strategies.fallback: Clear search via X to reveal recent history

strategies.name: DELETE_SEARCH_HISTORY_ENTRY
steps: ensure search field empty (tap X if needed)
tap the X next to the entry
strategies.fallback: If target entry not present, history may already be clear

strategies.name: CHANGE_VIEW_LAYOUT
steps: locate view toggle icon on right of folder header
tap to switch; icon shown represents the OTHER mode (list icon means current is grid)
strategies.success_signal: items visibly re-laid as grid cards or single-line list
strategies.fallback: Deselect any selected files first if toggle is inert

strategies.name: CREATE_NEW_FOLDER
strategies.preconditions: in a physical directory (internal storage path), not a category virtual view
strategies.success_signal: new folder appears in current directory
strategies.fallback: If 'New folder' missing, you are in a category view; switch to internal storage path

strategies.name: RENAME_FILE
steps: type new base name (extension preserved as unhighlighted suffix)

strategies.name: MOVE_FILE_TO_NEW_FOLDER
steps: navigate via hamburger to destination root (e.g., internal storage)
optionally tap add-new-folder icon and create destination folder, type name
strategies.success_signal: 'Moving 1 item' toast; file appears in destination
strategies.fallback: Press Back to abort move; restart

strategies.name: DELETE_FILE
steps: long-press file (don't single-tap, which opens it)
strategies.fallback: If file opened instead, press Back and long-press

strategies.name: GET_FILE_INFO
strategies.fallback: For quick size/time, read directly from card under filename in Downloads

strategies.name: OPEN_FILE_WITH_APP
steps: tap file (or long-press -> three-dot -> Open with)
in 'Open with' choose desired app (Markor for editing, Chrome for rendering, HTML Viewer for simple preview)
tap 'Just once' or 'Always' to set default
strategies.fallback: If Chrome first-run: Accept & continue, No thanks to sync; then re-open file

strategies.name: EDIT_AND_SAVE_IN_MARKOR
steps: tap inside text area to place cursor (or use search to find target)
insert/delete characters; optional bottom toolbar (checkbox, clock for date/time)
tap save (floppy) icon in top toolbar
save icon becomes greyed out when saved
strategies.success_signal: save icon greyed; reopening shows new content
strategies.fallback: Use undo arrow to revert mistakes

strategies.name: FIND_AND_REPLACE_IN_MARKOR
strategies.fallback: If simple search dialog appears, click SEARCH/REPLACE to switch modes

strategies.name: FIND_IN_PAGE_CHROME
strategies.fallback: If 0/0 and page seems blank, pull-to-refresh to reload

strategies.name: SET_DEFAULT_APP_FOR_FILE
strategies.preconditions: open_with_dialog visible from a single tap on the file
steps: select desired app row to enable Always button
strategies.success_signal: subsequent taps open in that app without chooser
strategies.fallback: If 'Always' disabled, must select an app row first; do not use long-press->Open with route

strategies.name: ANSWER_FROM_FILE_CARD
steps: read size and time displayed under filename on the card
strategies.success_signal: values read directly without opening Info
strategies.fallback: Use Get info for full date and exact time

dead_ends.note: Category views (Images/Documents/etc.) are virtual filters and do not allow folder creation. Navigate to internal storage path instead.

dead_ends.failed_action: click(category chip) to navigate to global category
dead_ends.note: Tapping a chip in Downloads only filters Downloads (often 'No matches'). Use hamburger -> category.
Built-in HTML Viewer may show blank for JS-heavy pages. Use Chrome instead.

dead_ends.failed_action: share via Bluetooth with no paired devices
dead_ends.note: Bluetooth discovery returns no devices in emulator; sharing cannot complete. Move on to next sub-task.
Digital Wellbeing timer blocks Files; OK dismiss only. Use Gallery as fallback for media queries.
Just once/Always buttons are greyed until an app row is selected.

dead_ends.failed_action: single-tap file expecting to select it
dead_ends.note: Single tap opens the file; use long-press to select for share/delete/rename/move.

dead_ends.failed_action: type query and expect replacement option
dead_ends.note: Simple search has no replace; tap 'SEARCH / REPLACE' bottom button to access find+replace.

dead_ends.failed_action: use Find in page on a blank page
dead_ends.note: If page hasn't rendered (0/0 matches), pull-to-refresh; otherwise interactive elements may need clicking.

dead_ends.failed_action: toggle multiple category filters to count items
dead_ends.note: Having two category filters active simultaneously may show union, not intersection, causing miscounts; isolate one filter at a time.

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: App is open at some default landing screen
abstract_steps: Identify if target location is a virtual category or a physical path
Drill down through sub-folders as needed
failure_modes: Confusing a category filter applied within the current folder with global navigation to that category
Opening the wrong adjacent item due to imprecise tap coordinates
verification_checklist: Header/breadcrumb reflects the intended destination
Visible content matches expectations for that location

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Target item or list is reachable in the app
abstract_steps: Optionally apply filters or search to narrow
Read the requested attribute from the list card or an item-detail/info screen
Return the value in the requested format
failure_modes: Reading from a filtered subset that excludes the target
Confusing modification time with creation time
Counting items while extra filters are still active
verification_checklist: Value taken from the authoritative detail view when precision is needed
All required filters are active and only those
Result reported in the requested units/format

categories.name: SEARCH_ENTRY
failure_modes: Searching within a narrower scope than intended
Typing into a non-focused field (accidentally editing content)
verification_checklist: Query text shown in the search bar
Applied filters are highlighted
Result list (or explicit no-match state) is visible

categories.name: DELETE_HISTORY_ENTRY
abstract_steps: Open search, ensure input is empty so history is shown
failure_modes: Target entry not present (already cleared or never recorded)
Confusing executing a new search with viewing history
verification_checklist: Target row no longer appears in the history list

categories.name: CHANGE_VIEW_OR_SORT
abstract_steps: Locate the layout toggle or overflow menu
Toggle layout or pick the desired sort criterion
failure_modes: Misreading the toggle icon (it represents the alternate mode, not the current one)
Selection mode blocking interaction with view controls
verification_checklist: Items visibly re-arranged in target layout/order
Toggle icon now shows the opposite state

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Currently inside a writable container (not a virtual/filtered view)
failure_modes: Attempting to create in a virtual/filtered view that disallows creation
Submitting without entering a name
verification_checklist: New entry appears in the destination
Breadcrumb/location is the intended container

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item can be selected and an action menu is reachable
abstract_steps: Long-press or otherwise select the item
Open the action menu and choose the edit/rename action
Modify the value while preserving constraints (e.g., extensions)
failure_modes: Single-tap inadvertently opens the item instead of selecting it
Overwriting protected portions like the file extension
verification_checklist: Updated value appears in the list
Constraints preserved (extension, type)

categories.name: MOVE_OR_COPY_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Item is selectable; destination is accessible
abstract_steps: Select the item and choose move/copy
Navigate the destination picker to the target container
Optionally create a new sub-container at the destination
failure_modes: Confirming at the wrong directory (placing item in parent rather than new sub-folder)
Cancelling by pressing back at the picker
verification_checklist: Source no longer contains the item (for move) or still contains it (for copy)
Destination contains the item

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Item is selectable and a delete action exists
failure_modes: Single-tap opening the item instead of selecting
Cancelling the confirmation
verification_checklist: Toast/feedback indicating deletion
Item no longer in list

categories.name: OPEN_WITH_EXTERNAL_APP
categories.precondition: System chooser is available for the item type
abstract_steps: Trigger open action on the item
Select desired handler app in the chooser
failure_modes: Confirming 'Always/Just once' before selecting an app (controls disabled)
Chooser not appearing because a default is already set
verification_checklist: Target app launches with the item loaded
If permanent default was requested, subsequent opens skip the chooser

categories.name: EDIT_TEXT_DOCUMENT
categories.precondition: Document open in a text editor
abstract_steps: Position cursor via tap or search tool
Optionally toggle preview to verify rendering
failure_modes: Edits made outside the intended region
Forgetting to save (save indicator still active)
verification_checklist: Save indicator is inactive/greyed
Reopen shows updated content

categories.name: FIND_AND_REPLACE_IN_DOCUMENT
abstract_steps: Switch to the find-and-replace mode if a simple search appears first
failure_modes: Using a search-only dialog and missing the toggle to replace mode
Replacing partial matches due to case/whole-word options
verification_checklist: Match count shown before replace
Document content reflects all replacements
File saved

categories.name: FIND_TEXT_IN_RENDERED_PAGE
categories.precondition: Page is rendered in a browser-like viewer
abstract_steps: Type the query and read the match counter
If counter is 0/0, ensure page is fully loaded/interacted with
failure_modes: Page not yet rendered when searching
Dynamic content requiring interaction to appear
verification_checklist: Counter reflects expected occurrences
Highlighted matches visible on page

categories.name: SHARE_ENTRY
failure_modes: Channel requires capability not present (e.g., no paired devices)
Permissions or system toggles disabled
verification_checklist: Send/Completed indication from the share target
If unable to complete, document the blocker and continue

categories.name: TOGGLE_APP_SETTING
categories.precondition: Relevant setting exists in an overflow menu
abstract_steps: Open the overflow menu within the relevant scope
failure_modes: Setting only applies within current scope/view
Setting requires elevated permission
verification_checklist: Menu reflects new state on reopen
Content view reflects the new behavior
